allow:
Bash(git commit -m "$\(cat <<''EOF''
Initial release: Founders Toolkit directory

- 34 tool listings across 10 categories
- Auto-generated comparison pages
- Pagefind search integration
- Stripe/Formspree placeholders ready
- Agent skills for autonomous operation

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")

Bash(git commit -m "$\(cat <<''EOF''
Add Stripe payment link and set production domain

- Configure site URL to founderstoolkit.org
- Add Stripe checkout link for featured listings

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")

Bash(git commit -m "$\(cat <<''EOF''
Add Formspree form integration

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")
Bash(for cat in automation backend content website-builders)
